results.question: What is the total revenue by store state for each year?
results.gold_sql: SELECT d.year, s.store_branch_state, SUM(f.transaction_sale_amount) AS total_revenue FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.dim_dates d ON f.event_date_key = d.date_key JOIN bl_dm.dm_store_branches s ON f.store_branch_surr_id = s.store_branch_surr_id GROUP BY d.year, s.store_branch_state ORDER BY d.year, total_revenue DESC;
results.generated_sql: SELECT s.store_branch_state, d.year, SUM(f.transaction_sale_amount) AS total_revenue FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.dim_dates d ON f.event_date_key = d.date_key JOIN bl_dm.dm_store_branches s ON f.store_branch_surr_id = s.store_branch_surr_id GROUP BY s.store_branch_state, d.year ORDER BY total_revenue DESC

results.question: What is the total revenue generated by each employee working in stores in New York?
results.gold_sql: SELECT e.employee_firstname, e.employee_lastname, SUM(f.transaction_sale_amount) AS total_revenue FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.v_employees_public e ON f.employee_surr_id = e.employee_surr_id WHERE e.is_active = TRUE AND e.employee_store_branch_state = 'Ny' GROUP BY e.employee_surr_id, e.employee_firstname, e.employee_lastname ORDER BY total_revenue DESC;
results.generated_sql: SELECT e.employee_firstname, e.employee_lastname, SUM(f.transaction_sale_amount) AS total_revenue FROM bl_dm.v_employees_public e JOIN bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f ON e.employee_surr_id = f.employee_surr_id WHERE e.is_active = TRUE AND employee_store_branch_state = 'Ny' AND employee_store_branch_city = 'New York' GROUP BY e.employee_firstname, e.employee_lastname ORDER BY total_revenue DESC NULLS LAST

results.question: What is the total revenue by payment method for each year?
results.gold_sql: SELECT d.year, j.junk_payment_method, SUM(f.transaction_sale_amount) AS total_revenue FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.dim_dates d ON f.event_date_key = d.date_key JOIN bl_dm.dm_junk_transactions j ON f.junk_surr_id = j.junk_surr_id GROUP BY d.year, j.junk_payment_method ORDER BY d.year, total_revenue DESC;
results.generated_sql: SELECT j.junk_payment_method, SUM(f.transaction_sale_amount) AS total_revenue, d.year FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.dm_junk_transactions j ON f.junk_surr_id = j.junk_surr_id JOIN bl_dm.dim_dates d ON f.event_date_key = d.date_key GROUP BY j.junk_payment_method, d.year ORDER BY total_revenue DESC

results.question: What is the total revenue by shipping method and product category?
results.gold_sql: SELECT sh.shipping_method, p.product_category, SUM(f.transaction_sale_amount) AS total_revenue FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.dm_shippings sh ON f.shipping_surr_id = sh.shipping_surr_id JOIN bl_dm.dm_products p ON f.product_surr_id = p.product_surr_id GROUP BY sh.shipping_method, p.product_category ORDER BY sh.shipping_method, total_revenue DESC;
results.generated_sql: SELECT j.junk_shipment_status, p.product_category, SUM(f.transaction_sale_amount) AS total_revenue FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.dm_junk_transactions j ON f.junk_surr_id = j.junk_surr_id JOIN bl_dm.dm_products p ON f.product_surr_id = p.product_surr_id GROUP BY j.junk_shipment_status, p.product_category ORDER BY total_revenue DESC

results.question: What is the total gross profit by store state in 2024?
results.gold_sql: SELECT s.store_branch_state, SUM(f.transaction_gross_profit) AS total_gross_profit FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.dim_dates d ON f.event_date_key = d.date_key JOIN bl_dm.dm_store_branches s ON f.store_branch_surr_id = s.store_branch_surr_id WHERE d.year = 2024 GROUP BY s.store_branch_state ORDER BY total_gross_profit DESC;
results.generated_sql: SELECT s.store_branch_state, SUM(f.transaction_gross_profit) AS total_gross_profit FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.dim_dates d ON f.event_date_key = d.date_key JOIN bl_dm.dm_store_branches s ON f.store_branch_surr_id = s.store_branch_surr_id WHERE d.year = 2024 GROUP BY s.store_branch_state ORDER BY total_gross_profit DESC NULLS LAST

results.question: Which product has the highest average profit margin?
results.gold_sql: SELECT p.product_name, AVG(f.transaction_profit_margin) AS avg_profit_margin FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.dm_products p ON f.product_surr_id = p.product_surr_id GROUP BY p.product_surr_id, p.product_name ORDER BY avg_profit_margin DESC LIMIT 1;
results.generated_sql: SELECT p.product_name, AVG(f.transaction_gross_profit) AS avg_profit_margin FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.dm_products p ON f.product_surr_id = p.product_surr_id GROUP BY p.product_name ORDER BY avg_profit_margin DESC LIMIT 1

results.question: How many transactions were placed on weekends?
results.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS weekend_transactions FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.dim_dates d ON f.event_date_key = d.date_key WHERE d.is_weekend = TRUE;

results.question: What is the total revenue from transactions placed on weekends versus weekdays?
results.gold_sql: SELECT d.is_weekend, SUM(f.transaction_sale_amount) AS total_revenue FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.dim_dates d ON f.event_date_key = d.date_key GROUP BY d.is_weekend ORDER BY d.is_weekend;
results.generated_sql: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN d.is_weekend = TRUE THEN f.transaction_sale_amount ELSE 0 END) AS weekend_revenue, SUM(CASE WHEN d.is_weekend = FALSE THEN f.transaction_sale_amount ELSE 0 END) AS weekday_revenue FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.dim_dates d ON f.event_date_key = d.date_key

results.question: What is the total revenue from transactions where the discount was greater than 20%?
results.gold_sql: SELECT SUM(transaction_sale_amount) AS total_revenue FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd WHERE transaction_discount_pct > 20;
results.generated_sql: SELECT SUM(f.transaction_sale_amount) AS total_revenue FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f WHERE f.transaction_discount_pct > 20
